name: prompt-saver
description: Local offline prompt manager with floating quick-copy buttons
author: BG Coding

scripts.cleanup: git rm -f --ignore-unmatch release.bat src-tauri/icons/Square107x107Logo.png src-tauri/icons/Square142x142Logo.png src-tauri/icons/Square150x150Logo.png src-tauri/icons/Square284x284Logo.png src-tauri/icons/Square30x30Logo.png src-tauri/icons/Square310x310Logo.png src-tauri/icons/Square44x44Logo.png src-tauri/icons/Square71x71Logo.png src-tauri/icons/Square89x89Logo.png src-tauri/icons/StoreLogo.png && git rm --cached --ignore-unmatch STARTSCRIPT.md
scripts.release:commit: git add -A && git commit -m "Prompt Saver 1.3.3 HotFix: drag text shift, descender clipping, installer scope choice"
scripts.release:publish: gh release create v1.3.3 src-tauri/target/release/prompt-saver.exe "src-tauri/target/release/bundle/nsis/Prompt Saver_1.3.3_x64-setup.exe" --title "Prompt Saver 1.3.3 — HotFix" --notes-file docs/release-notes.md
